params.name: Famous Mountains Guide
params.description: This guidebook compiles information on famous mountains from around the world, including their heights, local customs, and natural landscapes. It is a product of collaboration between multiple professional mountaineering teams, designed specifically for climbing enthusiasts, and is a must-read for travelers.
